privileged_info_summary: The task involves updating inventory in Copper POS (real NCH Software product). The five items to be modified are all real, commercially available products with accurate pricing: Colombian Dark Roast Coffee 12oz ($13.49) - verified via Parks Coffee and similar retailers; Madagascar Vanilla Bean Syrup 750ml ($10.29) - verified via Amoretti Premium at Walmart; Raw Wildflower Honey 16oz ($11.99) - verified via ShopRite; Organic Chamomile Tea 20ct ($6.49) - verified similar products from Target and Eden Foods; Italian Espresso Blend 1lb ($14.99) - verified via multiple specialty coffee retailers. The task uses custom SKUs (COFFEE-COL-12, SYR-VAN-750, HONEY-WF-16) and inventory quantities that are task-specific and synthetic. The data path points to the standard Copper POS installation directory on Windows.
